title: Observe and report plants or animals
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Observe and report plants or animals demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan and organise observations

pcs.text: Confirm processes for observations from supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm processes for observations from supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm processes for observations from supervisor.

pcs.text: Obtain equipment for observations according to instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain equipment for observations according to instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain equipment for observations according to instructions.

pcs.text: Select and use required personal protective equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and use required personal protective equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and use required personal protective equipment.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Plan and organise observations

elements.title: Collect and record information

pcs.text: Identify and record presence of plants or animals, according to organisational requirements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record presence of plants or animals, according to organisational requirements.

pcs.text: Observe and record plant or animal species using equipment according to supervisor requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Observe and record plant or animal species using equipment according to supervisor requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Observe and record plant or animal species using equipment according to supervisor requirements.

pcs.text: Confirm observation activities minimise degradation and disturbance to the environment, plants and animals with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm observation activities minimise degradation and disturbance to the environment, plants and animals with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm observation activities minimise degradation and disturbance to the environment, plants and animals with supervisor.

pcs.text: Carry out observation activities in accordance with work health and safety policies and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out observation activities in accordance with work health and safety policies and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out observation activities in accordance with work health and safety policies and procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Collect and record information

elements.title: Report data

pcs.text: Record and organise information on observed plants or animals according to organisational requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record and organise information on observed plants or animals according to organisational requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record and organise information on observed plants or animals according to organisational requirements.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate observation outcomes to supervisors?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate observation outcomes to supervisors.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plot and describe locations of an organism using maps, navigation systems and/or grid references.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Report data

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
